files.content:
// shadcn
import {
  Pagination,
  PaginationContent,
  PaginationItem,
  PaginationLink,
  PaginationNext,
  PaginationPrevious
} from "@/components/ui/pagination";

//  ------------------------------ | PAGINATION - BASIC | ------------------------------  //

export default function PaginationBasic() {
  return (
    <Pagination className="justify-start">
      <PaginationContent>
        <PaginationItem>
          <PaginationPrevious href="#" />
        </PaginationItem>
        <PaginationItem>
          <PaginationLink href="#">1</PaginationLink>
        </PaginationItem>
        <PaginationItem>
          <PaginationLink href="#" isActive>
            2
          </PaginationLink>
        </PaginationItem>
        <PaginationItem>
          <PaginationLink href="#">3</PaginationLink>
        </PaginationItem>
        <PaginationItem>
          <PaginationNext href="#" />
        </PaginationItem>
      </PaginationContent>
    </Pagination>
  );
}
